name: rapp-zoo
description: Local-first Pokédex for digital organisms. The page itself is a static HTML at /rapp-zoo/. This JSON drives what the page shows in the Starters and Discover tabs without anyone touching the HTML.

starters.name: Workday
starters.tagline: Focused, terse organism for daily standups, OKRs, calendar triage.

starters.name: Playtime
starters.tagline: Curious, expressive, weird-tangent friend. Music + games + storytelling.

starters.name: Journal
starters.tagline: Long-memory keeper. Recalls what you told it last week.

notes: starters is the bundled set — three personality eggs (workday/playtime/journal) that live in this repo at rapp-zoo/starters/<id>.egg. Each is a brainstem-egg/2.2-organism with a soul.md + a deterministic rappid. Hatching the same starter on two machines gets the same rappid, so the organisms recognize each other.

featured_starters is a curation of rapplication ids from the RAPP_Store v1 catalog — bigger, full-featured cartridges that round out what the Starters tab presents. The page renders the bundled `starters` first, then the featured RAPP_Store rapps below.
Discover tab pulls the full RAPP_Store catalog from sources.rapp_store and renders one card per rapplication.
Bundled starter .egg files are built by rapp-zoo/starters/_build.py — re-run it after changing a soul.md and commit the regenerated eggs.
